header.title: My Profile
header.subtitle: Manage voice fingerprints and default settings

timezone.primaryDesc: All times you see are displayed in this timezone. If you are a Korean national living abroad, set this to your current city.
timezone.referenceDesc: Timezones you check often appear alongside yours in the sidebar clock.

basic.name: Name
basic.languageHint: Used as the default for meeting translation

qnoteProfile.sectionTitle: My Profile (for Q note answer generation)
qnoteProfile.description: Information Q note uses to <1>answer as "me"</1> during meetings. Filling in job title/company/expertise/bio helps the AI speak on your behalf with more accurate and natural answers.<2></2>If empty, answers fall back to generic AI responses.
qnoteProfile.expertisePlaceholder: e.g. IoT, UX design, market analysis
qnoteProfile.bioPlaceholder: e.g. 8 years in LG Electronics product planning, smart-home strategy lead. Recently focused on AI-driven personalization.
qnoteProfile.bioHint: The AI uses this to reflect your background and voice in answers ({{length}}/{{max}})

voice.description: To <1>automatically recognize your own speech</1> during meetings, register your voice. If your meetings use multiple languages, <2>register once per language</2>. A voice registered in English will not reliably recognize Korean speech.
voice.empty: No voice registered yet. Choose a language below and start recording.
voice.addLangPrompt: Pick a language to <1>start recording immediately</1>
voice.verifyHint: Records 5 seconds of your current voice and checks whether it matches the stored fingerprint

recorder.sampleLabel: {{label}} · Please read the sentence below naturally (minimum {{minSec}}s)
recorder.hintLine: Finish the sentence and press "Finish Recording" yourself. Automatically stops at {{hardMax}}s.

privacy.item1: <1>Registered data</1>: Raw audio is not stored. Only the 256-dim vector (mathematical features) extracted by the Resemblyzer model is saved to the DB, and the original voice <2>cannot be reconstructed</2> from it. This is why there is no playback feature.
privacy.item2: <1>Usage</1>: Automatically detect your speech during meetings and merge your utterances after meetings end. Never sent to external services.
privacy.item3: <1>Meeting audio</1>: Temporarily buffered in memory during meetings and discarded immediately when the meeting ends.
privacy.item4: <1>Right to delete</1>: You can revoke your registration at any time via the "Delete" or "Delete All" buttons above.

confirm.deleteLangMessage: Delete the {{label}} voice registration? This language will no longer be used for self-detection in future meetings.
confirm.deleteAllMessage: Delete the voice fingerprints of all registered languages? This action cannot be undone.

messages.errorTooShortVerify: Verification failed: recording must be at least {{minSec}}s (current {{elapsed}}s). Please try again.
messages.errorTooShortRegister: Registration failed: recording must be at least {{minSec}}s (current {{elapsed}}s). Please read the full sentence and press "Finish Recording".
